title: General Aptitude - Analytical Aptitude - Family Relationship

questions.question:
Read the information given below and on the basis of the information, select the correct alternative for question given after the information.

There are six women, Shalini, Divya, Ritu, Rashmi, Nisha and Renu in a family of \( 12 \) members. There are few married couples in the family and none of the grand children are married. Sunil is married into the family. Rohan, Mahesh and Jatin have a nephew Dipesh who is the son of Rashmi. Ravi is the paternal grandfather of Nisha. Ritu is the daughter-in-law of Shalini. Renu is the first cousin of Dipesh. Shalini has only three grand children. Mahesh has two brothers and only one sister Rashmi and a sister-in-law Divya. Dipesh’s only unmarried maternal uncle Jatin is the brother-in-law of Sunil. Rohan is the paternal uncle of Nisha. Ritu has two daughters one of Whom is Nisha.

 

Rashmi is _____________ .



Analytical Aptitude: NIELIT 2021 Dec Scientist A

Read the information given below and on the basis of the information, select the correct alternative for question given after the information.

There are six women, Shalini, Divya, Ritu, Rashmi, Nisha and Renu in a family of \( 12 \) members. There are few married couples in the family and none of the grand children are married. Sunil is married into the family. Rohan, Mahesh and Jatin have a nephew Dipesh who is the son of Rashmi. Ravi is the paternal grandfather of Nisha. Ritu is the daughter-in-law of Shalini. Renu is the first cousin of Dipesh. Shalini has only three grand children. Mahesh has two brothers and only one sister Rashmi and a sister-in-law Divya. Dipesh’s only unmarried maternal uncle Jatin is the brother-in-law of Sunil. Rohan is the paternal uncle of Nisha. Ritu has two daughters one of Whom is Nisha.

Which one of the following is a married couple ?



Analytical Aptitude: NIELIT 2021 Dec Scientist A

Read the information given below and on the basis of the information, select the correct alternative for question given after the information.

There are six women, Shalini, Divya, Ritu, Rashmi, Nisha and Renu in a family of \( 12 \) members. There are few married couples in the family and none of the grand children are married. Sunil is married into the family. Rohan, Mahesh and Jatin have a nephew Dipesh who is the son of Rashmi. Ravi is the paternal grandfather of Nisha. Ritu is the daughter-in-law of Shalini. Renu is the first cousin of Dipesh. Shalini has only three grand children. Mahesh has two brothers and only one sister Rashmi and a sister-in-law Divya. Dipesh’s only unmarried maternal uncle Jatin is the brother-in-law of Sunil. Rohan is the paternal uncle of Nisha. Ritu has two daughters one of Whom is Nisha.

Dipesh is __________________ .



Analytical Aptitude: NIELIT 2021 Dec Scientist A

Read the information given below and on the basis of the information, select the correct alternative for question given after the information.

There are six women, Shalini, Divya, Ritu, Rashmi, Nisha and Renu in a family of \( 12 \) members. There are few married couples in the family and none of the grand children are married. Sunil is married into the family. Rohan, Mahesh and Jatin have a nephew Dipesh who is the son of Rashmi. Ravi is the paternal grandfather of Nisha. Ritu is the daughter-in-law of Shalini. Renu is the first cousin of Dipesh. Shalini has only three grand children. Mahesh has two brothers and only one sister Rashmi and a sister-in-law Divya. Dipesh’s only unmarried maternal uncle Jatin is the brother-in-law of Sunil. Rohan is the paternal uncle of Nisha. Ritu has two daughters one of Whom is Nisha.

How many married couples are there in the second generation?



Analytical Aptitude: NIELIT 2021 Dec Scientist A

Read the information given below and on the basis of the information, select the correct alternative for question given after the information.

There are six women, Shalini, Divya, Ritu, Rashmi, Nisha and Renu in a family of \( 12 \) members. There are few married couples in the family and none of the grand children are married. Sunil is married into the family. Rohan, Mahesh and Jatin have a nephew Dipesh who is the son of Rashmi. Ravi is the paternal grandfather of Nisha. Ritu is the daughter-in-law of Shalini. Renu is the first cousin of Dipesh. Shalini has only three grand children. Mahesh has two brothers and only one sister Rashmi and a sister-in-law Divya. Dipesh’s only unmarried maternal uncle Jatin is the brother-in-law of Sunil. Rohan is the paternal uncle of Nisha. Ritu has two daughters one of Whom is Nisha.

Which of the following is true?



Analytical Aptitude: NIELIT 2021 Dec Scientist A
options: Ravi is the paternal grandfather of Renu.
questions.correct_answer: Ravi is the paternal grandfather of Renu.

questions.question:
Directions \( (9-13) : \) Read the information given below and on the basis of the information, select the correct alternative for each question given after the information.

There are five persons \( \text{P, Q, R, S} \) and \( \text{T}. \) One is football player, one is chess player, one is hockey player. \( \text{P} \) and \( \text{S} \) are unmarried ladies and do not participate in any game. None of the ladies plays chess or football. There is a married couple in which \( \text{T} \) is the husband. \( \text{Q} \) is the brother of \( \text{R} \) and is neither a chess player nor a hockey player.

 

Who is the football player \( ? \)



Analytical Aptitude: NIELIT 2021 Dec Scientist B

Directions \( (9-13) : \) Read the information given below and on the basis of the information, select the correct alternative for each question given after the information.

There are five persons \( \text{P, Q, R, S} \) and \( \text{T}. \) One is football player, one is chess player, one is hockey player. \( \text{P} \) and \( \text{S} \) are unmarried ladies and do not participate in any game. None of the ladies plays chess or football. There is a married couple in which \( \text{T} \) is the husband. \( \text{Q} \) is the brother of \( \text{R} \) and is neither a chess player nor a hockey player.

 

Who is the chess player \( ? \)



Analytical Aptitude: NIELIT 2021 Dec Scientist B

In a family of six persons \( \text{A, B, C, D, E} \) and \( \text{F}, \) there are two married couples. The family has equal number of male and female.

  1. \( \text{D} \) is the grandmother of \( \text{A} \) and mother of \( \text{B} \)
  2. \( \text{C} \) is the wife of \( \text{B} \) and mother of \( \text{F}. \)
  3. \( \text{F} \) is the granddaughter of \( \text{E}. \)

Which of the following is true ?



Analytical Aptitude: NIELIT 2022 April Scientist B | Section A | Question: 31

There are five persons sitting on a bench. Blue eyed lady sitting in the middle is my mother. At the extreme left, the man with grey hair is my maternal uncle. Lady sitting at the extreme right is having a pimple on her nose and is the wife of person who is sitting between blue eyed lady and grey haired man and has a pointed nose. A lady having marks on her face is the younger sister of the blue eyed lady and sitting on the remaining fifth place. The person having a pointed nose is the son of the blue eyed lady. What is the lady having marks on her face to the man sitting at extreme left ?



Analytical Aptitude: NIELIT 2022 April Scientist B | Section A | Question: 38

Consider the following relationships among members of a family of six persons \( \text{A, B, C, D, E} \) and \( \text{F}: \)

  1. The number of males equals that of females.
  2. \( \text{A} \) and \( \text{E} \) are sons of \( \text{F}. \)
  3. \( \text{D} \) is the mother of two, one boy and one girl.
  4. \( \text{B} \) is the son of \( \text{A}. \)
  5. There is only one married couple in the family at present.

Which one of the following inferences can be drawn from the above?



Analytical Aptitude: NIELIT 2022 April Scientist B | Section A | Question: 4

A woman Manpreet asks a man Harpreet, "You are the brother of my uncle's daughter. How are you related to me?". What was the man's answer?



Analytical Aptitude: NIELIT 2023 Feb Scientist C | Section A | Question: 10

Rahul has two mothers. Shalini is the step-daughter of Seema and step-sister of Rahul. How is Seema related to Rahul?



Analytical Aptitude: NIELIT 2023 Feb Scientist C | Section A | Question: 12

A woman said, "His wife is the only daughter of my father", after introducing a man. How is that man related to the woman?



Analytical Aptitude: NIELIT 2023 Feb Scientist C | Section A | Question: 18

Chlorophyll: Plant: : Haemoglobin:?



Analytical Aptitude: NIELIT 2023 Feb Scientist C | Section A | Question: 2

If

  1. \( \mathrm{A} \) is brother of \( \mathrm{B} \)
  2. \( \mathrm{B} \) is brother of \( \mathrm{C} \)
  3. \( \mathrm{C} \) is brother of \( \mathrm{D} \)
  4. \( \mathrm{D} \) is sister of \( \mathrm{E} \)

Then which of the following statements is not necessarily true?



Analytical Aptitude: NIELIT 2023 Feb Scientist C | Section A | Question: 20
options: \( \text{A, B, C} \) are male and \( \text{D} \) is a female

questions.question:
Answer the question on the basis of the data given below:

  • \( O \) is \( X’s \) father
  • \( Y \) is \( Z’s \) mother
  • \( P \) is \( O’s \) mother
  • \( X \) is \( Z’s \) Sister

How is \( O \) related to \( Z \)?



Analytical Aptitude: NIELIT Scientific Assistant A 2020 November: 26

Answer the question on the basis of the data given below:

  • \( O \) is \( X’s \) father
  • \( Y \) is \( Z’s \) mother
  • \( P \) is \( O’s \) mother
  • \( X \) is \( Z’s \) Sister

How is \( P \) related to \( X \)?



Analytical Aptitude: NIELIT Scientific Assistant A 2020 November: 27

Answer the question on the basis of the data given below:

  • \( O \) is \( X’s \) father
  • \( Y \) is \( Z’s \) mother
  • \( P \) is \( O’s \) mother
  • \( X \) is \( Z’s \) Sister

How is \( Y \) related to \( O \)?



Analytical Aptitude: NIELIT Scientific Assistant A 2020 November: 28

Answer the question on the basis of the data given below:

  • \( O \) is \( X’s \) father
  • \( Y \) is \( Z’s \) mother
  • \( P \) is \( O’s \) mother
  • \( X \) is \( Z’s \) Sister

If \( P \) has a daughter \( Q \), then how is \( Q \) related to \( Z \)?



Analytical Aptitude: NIELIT Scientific Assistant A 2020 November: 29

Read the following information carefully and then answer the question given below it.

\( \text{A, B, C, D, E and F} \) are six members of a family.

There are two married couples among them.

\( C \) is the mother of \( A \) and \( F \).

\( E \) is the father of \( D \).

A is the grandson of \( B \).

The total number of female members in the family is three.

Which of the following pairs is one of the married couples?



Analytical Aptitude: NIELIT Scientist B 2020 November: 18

Read the following information carefully and then answer the question given below it.

\( \text{A, B, C, D, E and F} \) are six members of a family.

There are two married couples among them.

\( C \) is the mother of \( A \) and \( F \).

\( E \) is the father of \( D \).

\( A \) is the grandson of \( B \).

The total number of female members in the family is three.

How is \( B \) related to \( F \)?



Analytical Aptitude: NIELIT Scientist B 2020 November: 19

Read the following information carefully and then answer the question given below it.

\( \text{A, B, C, D, E and F} \) are six members of a family.

There are two married couples among them.

\( C \) is the mother of \( A \) and \( F \).

\( E \) is the father of \( D \).

\( A \) is the grandson of \( B \).

The total number of female members in the family is three.

How is \( F \) related to \( A \)?



Analytical Aptitude: NIELIT Scientist B 2020 November: 20

Consists of a question and two statements, labelled (1) and (2), in which certain data are given. You have to decide whether the data given in the statements are sufficient for answering the question. Using the data given in the statements, plus your knowledge of mathematics and everyday facts.

How is \( R \) related to \( S \)?

\( \text{Statement(1):} \)

\( T \), the wife of\( R’s \) only brother \( C \) does not have any siblings.

\( \text{Statement (2):} \)

\( S \) is \( T’s \) brother-in-law’s wife.



Analytical Aptitude: NIELIT Scientist B 2020 November: 42
options: Only \( \text{Statement (1)} \) is required for answering the question
Only \( \text{Statement (2)} \) is required for answering the question
Both statement together are required to answer the question
Answer cannot be ascertained with the given information
questions.correct_answer: Both statement together are required to answer the question
